name: @open-neko/connector-google-workspace
description: Google Workspace connector for OpenNeko — per-operator OAuth via PKCE against the operator's own Google Cloud OAuth client. Provides Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, and Sheets actions backed by each operator's authorised account. Runs in a microsandbox VM with network egress limited to accounts.google.com and *.googleapis.com.

env.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Google Cloud Console project. Deployment-wide — every operator who connects uses the same client. Create at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials → Create credentials → OAuth client ID → Web application. Set Authorized redirect URI to https://<your-deployment>/api/integrations/connect/%40open-neko%2Fconnector-google-workspace/callback.
OAuth 2.0 Client Secret paired with the client ID above. Stored in the per-user secrets file, never echoed.

kinds.description: Send an email from the connected user's Gmail account.

example.subject: Weekly revenue summary
example.body:
Hi Amit,

Q3 revenue is in — see the dashboard for details.

— OpenNeko

kinds.description: List upcoming events on the connected user's primary calendar.
Append a row to a Google Sheet the connected user can edit.
